title: Tagging with Automated Updates
excerpt:

posts.author: robbietdm (Robbie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

When we use the automated updates, Monday isn’t mentioning, or tagging, the people from the people column, just places their name in. We all work from the “I was mentioned” in our Inbox, so those automated updates are not populating in our mentioned Inbox.

Is there a way to create the link?

posts.author: Sven (Sven Kaufmann)
posts.cookedHtml: Nearly 2 years later, has this been solved? This would solve many issues I have right away…

posts.author: dk_NFroehlich (Nils Fröhlich)
posts.cookedHtml:
As there is a flood of notifications for seemingly every action that is taken in monday people have started to only allow notifications “when I am mentionend”. However there are important automated updates that I want people to be notified about. If it were possible to insert true mentions - meaning not only name as plaintext but the hyperlink to that person as well - people would be notified.

So this is a feature request.

posts.author: lucina.fox (Lucy Fox)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a feature request submitted we can upvote?

posts.author: nethelper (hong)
posts.cookedHtml: we need this, it has been 4 years since the first request!
